channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-05-15)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-05-15.

item.title: [HOT] Baby Audio|Get 46% off Smooth Operator Pro by Baby Audio. The discounted price is $69.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] GullDSP|New free and open source modern bass guitar preamp/distortion plugin. GullDSP Phathom – Windows VST3 only.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Moonwave FX|Get Aries by Moonwave FX free. Regular price $40.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Analog Legends|Get 80% off Lucid by Analog Legends for $19.99 (Normally 99.99).?NEW
[HOT] Sonnox|Get 75% off Oxford SuprEsser by Sonnox. The discounted price is $59.?NEW
[HOT] Sonnox|Get 74% off Voca by Sonnox. The discounted price is $29.?NEW
[HOT] Sonnox|Get 75% off Oxford Reverb by Sonnox. The discounted price is $79.?NEW
[HOT] Solid State Logic|Get 74% off SSL Fusion Transformer by Solid State Logic. The discounted price is $25.?NEW
